sentences.arabic: صَارَ التَّعْلِيمُ الرَّقْمِيُّ مَوْجُودًا فِي كُلِّ الْمَدَارِسِ الْحَدِيثَةِ.
sentences.translation: Digitalno obrazovanje postalo je prisutno u svim modernim školama.
sentences.translationEn: Digital education has become present in all modern schools.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَعْمِلُ الطُّلَّابُ الْحَوَاسِيبَ الْمَحْمُولَةَ لِلدِّرَاسَةِ وَأَدَاءِ الْوَاجِبَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Učenici koriste laptopa za učenje i obavljanje zadaće.
sentences.translationEn: Students use laptops for studying and doing homework.

sentences.arabic: تُوَفِّرُ هَذِهِ الْأَدَوَاتُ مَصَادِرَ كَثِيرَةً لِلْمَعْرِفَةِ وَالتَّعَلُّمِ.
sentences.translation: Ovi alati pružaju brojne izvore za znanje i učenje.
sentences.translationEn: These tools provide many sources for knowledge and learning.

sentences.arabic: يُحِبُّ الْمُعَلِّمُونَ اسْتِخْدَامَ الشَّاشَاتِ التَّفَاعُلِيَّةِ فِي الصُّفُوفِ.
sentences.translation: Nastavnici vole koristiti interaktivne ekrane u učionicama.
sentences.translationEn: Teachers like using interactive screens in classrooms.
